title: Auto-profit threshold — single-bullet bluff (rake-agnostic, 100bb effective)
bodyMarkdown:
Bet B into pot P needs villain to fold at least B/(P+B) of their range to be auto-profit before equity is considered. Rake-agnostic at 100bb effective; pure pot-odds derivation.

Worked example: bet 6 into pot 8 → break-even fold frequency = 6/14 = 42.9%.

assumptions.field: all 9-handed live cash and tournament fields (formula is field-invariant)

atomicityJustification: Single derivation (auto-profit threshold) presented as one card.
